'''Lelmra''' was a mountainous [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Churba sector/Legends|Churba sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. At one time, it was the headquarters of [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]], and also served as a backup base for the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] organization of [[Mazzic]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The PC game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places the Churba Sector and, consequently, Lelmra, in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].
